title: Inscriptions On A Sun-Dial
content:
For Dr Henry L Bowditch


    With warning hand I mark Time's rapid flight
    From life's glad morning to it's solemn night;
    Yet through thee dear God's love, I also show
    There's Light above me by the shade below
meaning:
John Greenleaf Whittier's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Inscriptions On A Sun-Dial"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
